title: デビュー戦の後に・変われる1歩を

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower takes her first step as a racer and
makes her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, she watches one of Mihono
Bourbon's races, who, despite debuting in the
same year, is already drawing a lot of attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her bring smiles to so many people's faces
inspires Rice Shower to run in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the goal of catching up to Mihono Bourbon
set firmly in her mind... she decides to run in the
Spring Stakes as a warm-up for the Triple Crown.
